title: Deneter

{{Quote|It looks like there's a planet called Deneter up ahead. It was abandoned after the Clone Wars — it was so decimated by battles that the population emigrated to the Core. It has twenty orbiting uninhabited satellites.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Ferus Olin]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
'''Deneter''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DW" /> located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC" /> that was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by twenty uninhabited satellites.<ref name="DW" /> It was located in a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] near the [[The Red Twins/Legends|Red Twins]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|183|Deneter}}</ref>

==History==
Deneter was the site of devastating battles during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] which rendered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] virtually uninhabitable.<ref name="CSWE" /> Due to the extensive damages caused by the war, the population left everything behind and emigrated to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]],<ref name="DW" /> especially [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE" />

A few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|fall]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], [[Ferus Olin]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Trever Flume]] were on the run from the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], who was working for [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Malorum]] at the time. The trio outmaneuvered Fett and tricked him into crash-landing his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']], on one of the satellites of Deneter.<ref name="DW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Deneter first appeared in the novel ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]''. Although the novel placed the planet in the Red Twins' star system,<ref name="DW" /> the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]] created a separate Deneter system.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> This discrepancy was later fixed as the Deneter system was removed from [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]]. Jason Fry later confirmed this revision and the localization of Deneter in the Red Twins system.<ref name="Email">{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion 2023 2.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2023-04-07}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' {{1st}}
